prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford 427 SOHC 'Cammer' (FE-series, 7.0L V8) with forged internals (Manley 4340 steel crank, Eagle H-beam rods, JE 12.5:1 forged pistons), ported and polished heads by CHI Cylinder Heads, custom billet camshafts (Comp Cams 248/254 duration, .650/.650 lift), and a Kinsler cross-ram intake manifold with dual 4-barrel Holley 4500 Dominator carbs

Forced induction via a custom-built Paxton SN-2000 supercharger (12 psi boost) with an intercooler system (Spearco front-mount core, Earl's -10 AN plumbing, and a Davies Craig EWP150 electric water pump) and a custom fuel system (Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Holley HP EFI ECU for standalone management)

Drivetrain upgrades including a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission with a McLeod twin-disc RST clutch, a Ford 9-inch rear end with a Detroit Locker differential, 3.89:1 gears, and Moser 31-spline axles, paired with a custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch aluminum, balanced to 8,000 RPM)
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Rare Classics '64.5 Mustang GT350R-inspired kit with hand-laid carbon fiber fenders, quarter panels, and front/rear bumpers, featuring integrated side-exit exhaust cutouts and a functional hood scoop for the intercooler

Suspension overhaul with a Heidts Pro-G IRS system (coil-over adjustable, 2.5-inch drop), Global West subframe connectors, and a custom front strut tower brace by Scott Drake, paired with Wilwood 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers clamping 13-inch rotors with stainless steel braided lines

Interior rework featuring a full roll cage by Chassisworks (8-point, mild steel, NHRA-certified), Recaro SRD XL fixed-back seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a Flaming River tilt column, and a custom gauge cluster with Dakota Digital HDX series (oil pressure, boost, AFR, and fuel pressure readouts)
